title: brassia lanceana var. pumila
intro: Brassia lanceana var. pumila is a rare and miniature species of orchid, which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the roots of Brassia lanceana var. pumila have been used in herbal medicine for their purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the roots of Brassia lanceana var. pumila are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
